description: Labels the distributed triage sub-skill is allowed to apply. Subset of the main labels.json.

labels.name: oncall: distributed parallelisms
labels.description: Distributed parallelisms oncall (FSDP, DDP, DTensor, DeviceMesh, tensor parallel, context parallel, pipeline parallel, symmetric memory)

labels.name: oncall: distributed infra
labels.description: Distributed infrastructure oncall (c10d, process groups, NCCL/Gloo/MPI backends, elastic, torchrun, stores)

labels.name: oncall: distributed checkpointing
labels.description: Oncall label should be attached to any issues related to distributed checkpointing.

labels.name: module: c10d
labels.description: Process groups, collectives, stores, and communication backends

labels.name: ptd-bot-triaged
labels.description: Issue has been triaged by the distributed triage bot

labels.name: feature
labels.description: Wholly new functionality that does not exist today

labels.name: enhancement
labels.description: Improvement to something that already works
